Name: meld7t-orthanc
// storage: DICOM files on the orthanc-storage volume; index in PostgreSQL (spec §4).
// access: Caddy, API, and worker use one rotated internal service credential. Browser users
// access2: authenticate separately at Caddy and never receive the Orthanc credential.
// dicom-scp: C-STORE listener is out of MVP scope (§23); enable + publish 4242 later.
// durability: Storage is quiesced and backed up together with its PostgreSQL index.
